{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Emperor’s Hall of Address
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Emperor’s Hall of Address]] is a specially constructed auditorium used for [[the Emperor]] to speak to the nation.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
